ComponentType: Thin Film Chip Fuse (Surface Mount Fuse)
Description: This is a fast-acting, surface-mount thin film fuse designed for overcurrent protection in electronic circuits. It operates by opening the circuit within 5 seconds at 250% of its rated current, thereby protecting downstream components from damage due to overloads or short circuits.

KeyParameters.**Rated Current (Irat)**: 0.4A to 4.0A (Specific value depends on part number, e.g., 0.5A, 1.0A, 2.0A)
KeyParameters.**Rated Voltage**: DC 32V or DC 50V (Specific value depends on part number/series)
KeyParameters.**Breaking Capacity (Interrupting Rating: 35A @ 32VDC or 50A @ 50VDC/35VAC (Specific value depends on part number/series)
KeyParameters.**Maximum Resistance (Rmax)**: 10 mΩ to 350 mΩ (Tolerance ±25%, measured at <10% Irat, specific value depends on part number)
KeyParameters.**Fusing Characteristic (Time-Current)**: Opens within 5 seconds at 250% of rated current.
KeyParameters.**Body Temperature Rise**: <75°C when operating at 100% of its rated current.
